hero.desc: Discover a refined fragrance exhibition where elegance meets creativity—explore exclusive scents and meet world-class perfumers.

about.desc: After more than 20 years, the perfume exhibition returns to Istanbul, bringing together over 90 international brands, experts, and enthusiasts in a unique event celebrating luxury, innovation, and global fragrance culture.

card1.title: International Brands
card1.desc: Over 90 exhibitors showcasing exclusive perfumes and latest creations.

card2.title: Unique Experiences
card2.desc: Enjoy workshops, perfume creation, and interactive fragrance activities.
